transcript:
Morgan: The release-readiness review focused on the billing handoff, support runbook, and launch dashboard for the new account settings workflow.
Avery: We confirmed the feature flag will stay off until the support runbook is approved.
Riley: The only blocker is the missing webhook retry metric.
Morgan: Avery will add the webhook retry metric to the dashboard by Friday.
Riley: Morgan will send the updated support runbook to the launch channel on Thursday.
Avery: We agreed to keep the first rollout at 10 percent for one business day before expanding.

Priya: The data-quality review covered duplicate account rows, missing owner fields, and stale enrichment timestamps.
Sam: We decided to block the import when owner is blank for more than 25 rows.
Lee: Priya will publish the rejected-row report by Monday.
Sam: The dependency is the warehouse backfill finishing before the Wednesday validation window.
Priya: The open question is whether support needs the report in CSV or a dashboard tile?
